SEARCH
Module storm.spring
Package st.orm.spring

Class RepositoryBeanFactoryPostProcessor.RepositoryAutowireCandidateResolver

java.lang.Object
st.orm.spring.RepositoryBeanFactoryPostProcessor.RepositoryAutowireCandidateResolver
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.beans.factory.support.AutowireCandidateResolver
Enclosing class:
RepositoryBeanFactoryPostProcessor
public static class RepositoryBeanFactoryPostProcessor.RepositoryAutowireCandidateResolver extends Object implements org.springframework.beans.factory.support.AutowireCandidateResolver
Qualifier-aware AutowireCandidateResolver that reads "qualifier" attribute (set on the repository bean definitions we register).
